title: Pre-registered architecture search - iteration 1 (4 FNO variants)

h2_test_2010_2014_holdout.fno_NOT_significant_on_h2: TRUE - the selected model fails the 2010-2014 true holdout

international_5_intl_assets: INSUFFICIENT DATA - intl assets only have data from 2004, too short for the pre-reg train period 2000-2014
conclusion: FNO_medium is excellent on H1 (2025+) but FAILS on H2 (2010-2014 true holdout). This is a regime-specific result, not robust. The cascade slope is robustly negative on both H1 and H2 (-0.16 and -0.32). The FNO fails to generalize across the GFC vs calm period transition.
